{# _vendor_task_edit_form.html — Inline edit form for an existing vendor task. Receives: task (RequisitionTask), vendor_id (int), error (str|None, validation message from POST edit error branches) Called by: GET /v2/partials/tasks/{task_id}/edit-form (vendor branch), POST /v2/partials/tasks/{task_id}/edit (validation errors) Depends on: POST /v2/partials/tasks/{task_id}/edit #} {# Root div re-carries the id of the container this fragment outerHTML-replaces (#vendor-tasks-{id}) — without it the Save/Cancel hx-targets match nothing and htmx aborts (htmx:targetError) before any request. Classes mirror _vendor_tasks.html. #}
{% if error %}

{{ error }}

{% endif %}
